notes: Patterns ported from the original Cashiro ZemenBankParser.kt (parser-core/src/main/kotlin/com/ritesh/parser/core/bank/ZemenBankParser.kt). Zemen Bank (Ethiopia, ETB) narratives: "has been credited with ETB ... from telebirr wallet NNN with reference FT...", "a fund transfer has been made from your account ... to A/c of NNN", POS/ATM "transaction POS|ATM location is ...", and "you have transferred ... to NAME with reference". The Kotlin parser checks the credited keywords BEFORE any debit/expense keyword, so the INCOME classification is replicated as a pipeline step that runs before typeRules (engine typeRules would otherwise test expense first).

requireAnyKeyword: fund transfer has been made from
pos transaction has been made from
atm cash withdrawal has been made from
thank you for banking with zemen bank

expense: fund transfer has been made from
pos transaction has been made from
atm cash withdrawal has been made from

fixtures.name: credit from telebirr wallet
fixtures.body: Dear Customer, your account 313xxxxxxx1234 has been credited with ETB 1,500.00 from telebirr wallet 251911223344 with reference FT26160ABCD1 on 09-Jun-2026. Your Current Balance is ETB 12,345.67. Thank you for banking with Zemen Bank.

fixtures.name: credit from another bank sender
fixtures.body: Dear Customer, your account 313xxxxxxx1234 has been credited with ETB 5,000.00 from ABEBE KEBEDE with reference FT26159ZZ001. Your available balance is ETB 15,345.67. Thank you for banking with Zemen Bank.

fixtures.name: fund transfer debit to internal account
fixtures.body: Dear Customer, a fund transfer has been made from your account 313xxxxxxx1234 to A/c of 1020304050 with reference FT26161XYZ90 on 10-Jun-2026. The transferred amount is ETB 2,000.00. Your Current Balance is ETB 10,345.67. Thank you for banking with Zemen Bank.

fixtures.name: pos transaction with location
fixtures.body: Dear Customer, a POS transaction has been made from your account (313xxxxxxx5678) with ETB 850.50. The transaction POS location is EDNA MALL ADDIS ABABA . Your Current Balance is ETB 4,000.00. The transaction reference number is POS123456789. Thank you for banking with Zemen Bank.

fixtures.name: atm cash withdrawal with location
fixtures.body: Dear Customer, an ATM cash withdrawal has been made from your account 313xxxxxxx1234 with ETB 3,000.00. The transaction ATM location is BOLE MEDHANIALEM BRANCH . A/c Available Bal. is ETB 7,345.67. Thank you for banking with Zemen Bank.

fixtures.name: outgoing transfer to external beneficiary
fixtures.body: Dear Customer, you have transferred ETB 700.00 to ALMAZ TESFAYE with reference FT26155BBB12 from your account 313xxxxxxx1234. Your Current Balance is ETB 9,645.67. Thank you for banking with Zemen Bank.

fixtures.name: otp message is filter-rejected
fixtures.body: Your OTP for Zemen Bank internet banking login is 482910. Do not share this code with anyone.
